name: singapore-court-legal
description: Grounded answers on Singapore civil court procedure (Rules of Court 2021) via the MikeROS connector — cites the governing rules, attaches operator-verified case authorities where they apply, surfaces relevance-gated reasoning chains, and abstains honestly when out of scope (never fabricates a rule or case). Single-question, durable multi-turn, and structured guided situation analysis. Not legal advice.
